title: jasminum glaucum
intro: Jasminum glaucum, also known as the Blue Jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Jasminum glaucum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
